entry.title: Re: Media/MIME config in Vocabulary-based SEGW project
entry.content: Refresh Cache from gateway system and try. It should work.

entry.title: How to reopen a closed contract in Ariba CMS
entry.content:
Hello All,

When I try to reopen a closed contract in Ariba with Amendment of type amendment and also with type republish I am getting proxy error as below. Please suggest a resolution to reopen the closed contract.

Proxy Error

The proxy server received an invalid response from an upstream server.
The proxy server could not handle the request

Reason: Error reading from remote server

entry.title: Mismatch between Stock position in Inventory Active data table and Reference point table
entry.content:
Hi,

For a very few plant material combinations, the stock quantity in Inventory Active data table in BW is not matching with Reference point table. The stock position between S4 and BW Inventory DSO/Active table foe these cases are in sync but there is a discrepancy with reference point table of the same Inventory DSO.

Kindly suggest on the possible root cause of this.

entry.title: Re: Help Needed: Converting String to Date in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: After adding DATS_TO_DATN we are facing issue from DataSphere. errorgetCSNDefinition: invalid remote object name: No enum constant com.sap.hana.dp.abapadapter.ABAPAdapter.ABAPDATATYPES.DATN: line 0 col 0 (at pos 0), Code: 476, SQL State: HY000 What will be the reason

entry.title: Re: Error trying to open a SAP B1 UDO form in Visual Studio
entry.content: Thanks man..

entry.title: Re: SAP Omnichannel Sales Transfer and Audit a new sales transaction validation industry cloud solut
entry.content:
Thank you, Oliver, for your answer.

I am looking for possible solutions for information exchange between POS systems and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition without the IS-Retail industry solution. Do I understand correctly that SAP Omnichannel Sales Transfer and Audit transfers documents in IDOC format to SAP S/4HANA and this is a fixed list of document types?

Is it possible to make your own modifications (custom development) to SAP OSTA in the part that is responsible for transferring documents in customized json format to the SAP S/4HANA system?

entry.title: Re: valuated stock in transit for scope item BDN
entry.content: thanks

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content:
Hi @gerd_schoeffl 

When trying to migrate from custom widget to this new solution, I noticed a challenge for those file uploads using Pivot Settings, more specifically the "Pivot Column Start" allowed users to dynamically upload an x nr. of periods.
In the new File Upload Starter & related the SAC upload job wrangling I only see a way to pivot a fixed nr. of columns. In our customer use case, users could upload at least 7 and maximum 18 forward looking periods. Is there any known solution or workaround for this?

entry.title: Re: Entering SAP Signavio certification
entry.content: Hi Daniel, thanks for your question. There are currently no certification workshops in the pipeline from our side. However, please feel free to take a look at our event offerings on  signavio.com/events to find helpful events covering topics on the Business Process Manager.

entry.title: Re: My Object Page V4 is empty , except Header. Even i ca...
entry.content: type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE, that is to reference the child entity. you only have one entity, it is not for you. you need field group annotation.

entry.title: Re: po output type is blank in ME23N but triggered in change mode ME22N
entry.content: Hello, Ankurch i have a similar issue i am not able see print in messages as i am able to see print preview all the data . i have check it is showing status as inpreperation in print preview i have check manage output but i couldnot even find the purchase roder in that..could suggest on this

entry.title: Sessions TechEd Virtual VS Live
entry.content:
Hello Community! 

The Teched Sessions are available! 

I'm not sure yet if I can participate the live event in Florida. But, If I had all the time in the world, I’d attend every session, both virtual and live, because there’s so much great content. But I’m really busy, and I can’t spend four full days watching everything.

With that in mind,
what’s the best way for you to make the most of the live event and virtual?
How should I focus my time to get the best experience, the session live will replicate the virtual ones?

Thank you,

Sebastiano

entry.title: Need to add description when creating a new open item reference
entry.content:
Why do we need to add an "Open Item Reference Description" when creating a new open item reference?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need to add description when creating a new open item...
entry.content:
A description has to be entered for your posting procedure as well as the year to which the procedure refers. The year is used only for grouping the open item reference and provides you with a reference to search by.

Please refer to the Help Document mentioned below for more information:

General Ledger Accounts Quick Guide | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Aborted TWB-Job SMT_BATCH_EXECUTE
entry.content:
The error message states that the job passed the time window to be able to start, meaning that all background work processes were occupied during that time period.

You need to increase the background work processes number or speed the overall system performance to let all other jobs to finish faster and free the resource to run other jobs on queue.

entry.title: Re: Massachusetts - Supplemental vs Base Wages
entry.content:
Hi Alicia,

Are you using BSI SaaS? We're on transition to SaaS version and noticed that supplemental tax amount is not the same as on OP during the testing. We'd just created a ticket to BSI, but your issue seems the same as ours.

 

Regards,

Euna

entry.title: Re: SAC Lookup-Table - IF Statement
entry.content:
Hello @SAC_Newbie 

I'm not a Data Action Code expert, either 😉 I just would like to give some hints to think about...

What I miss in your example is the a) the Date and b) if you want to have the new information in a new model dimension of Dataset A or as a property in the Article dimension.

However, even on the same date, I guess you can have more than 1 record, and only the sum of the price will reflect the proper interval you want to derive? So which of the e.g. 3 records, which return the total price 15 should get the Assignment information?

I think you should - and maybe this is easier - create new records, Article per Date - without Price - but one separate dimension with an indicator (dimension 'contains assignment' = "Y") and the Assignment dimension.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP Omnichannel Sales Transfer and Audit a new sales transaction validation industry cloud solut
entry.content:
The POS Inbound interface in S/4 is based on SOAP and no longer uses IDOC formats. you can see details in the documentation.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9905622a5c1f49ba84e9076fc83a9c2c/6e24835edb104565bcbe34c075c34ad0.html?locale=en-US&q=Retail%20POS%20inbound
Of course you can take the messages from OSTA and transform them and import them in your preferred way into a non-retail system. The same is also necessary for the masterdata. OSTA expects a defined format to come from S/4 Retail. 
All custom development cannot be done within OSTA, but can only happen outside in a middleware.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: Source DMIS 2011 SP27 - repl. server DMIS 2011 SP16 c...
entry.content:
Hello,

An SLT system on DMIS 2011 SP16 supports a source system on DMIS 2011 SP13-SP16. 

Best Regards,
Michael
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: ALV CONTROLL TREE
entry.content:
You may use the protected method GET_INDEX_FROM_NODE_KEY in CL_ALV_TREE_BASE (super class of CL_GUI_ALV_TREE_SIMPLE). To use a protected method, you may inherit the class and create another method which calls this protected method e.g. below code.

Don't forget to declare your instance TYPE REF TO lcl_gui_alv_tree_simple instead of cl_gui_alv_tree_simple.

 

CLASS lcl_gui_alv_tree_simple DEFINITION INHERITING FROM cl_gui_alv_tree_simple.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS constructor
      IMPORTING  VALUE(i_lifetime)            TYPE i       OPTIONAL
                 VALUE(i_parent)              TYPE REF TO cl_gui_container OPTIONAL
                 VALUE(i_shellstyle)          TYPE i       OPTIONAL
                 VALUE(i_node_selection_mode) TYPE i       DEFAULT cl_gui_column_tree=>node_sel_mode_single
                 VALUE(i_hide_selection)      TYPE as4flag OPTIONAL
                 VALUE(i_item_selection)      TYPE as4flag DEFAULT 'X'
                 VALUE(i_no_toolbar)          TYPE as4flag OPTIONAL
                 VALUE(i_no_html_header)      TYPE as4flag OPTIONAL
                 VALUE(i_print)               TYPE as4flag OPTIONAL
      EXCEPTIONS todo.

    METHODS get_index_from_node_key2
      IMPORTING  i_node_key TYPE lvc_nkey
      EXPORTING  e_index    TYPE lvc_index
      EXCEPTIONS node_not_found.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS lcl_gui_alv_tree_simple IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.
    super->constructor( EXPORTING  i_lifetime            = i_lifetime
                                   i_parent              = i_parent
                                   i_shellstyle          = i_shellstyle
                                   i_node_selection_mode = i_node_selection_mode
                                   i_hide_selection      = i_hide_selection
                                   i_item_selection      = i_item_selection
                                   i_no_toolbar          = i_no_toolbar
                                   i_no_html_header      = i_no_html_header
                                   i_print               = i_print
                        EXCEPTIONS cntl_error                  = 1
                                   cntl_system_error           = 2
                                   create_error                = 3
                                   lifetime_error              = 4
                                   illegal_node_selection_mode = 5
                                   failed                      = 6
                                   illegal_column_name         = 7 ).
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      " TODO
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD get_index_from_node_key2.
    get_index_from_node_key( EXPORTING  i_node_key     = i_node_key
                             IMPORTING  e_index        = e_index
                             EXCEPTIONS node_not_found = 1 ).
    IF sy-subrc = 1.
      RAISE node_not_found.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: How to Use Custom Fields for Pricing in Sales Documents
entry.content:
Hi @kiran_kumar262,

In S/4HANA Public Cloud there is no USEREXIT_PRICING_PREPARE_TKOMK or similar BAdI available. Therefore it is recommended to fill the value of the custom field in sales document and pass it to pricing via the mentioned business scenario. Do you see any issue doing that?
If you want to set the field automatically in the sales document, you can use BAdIs SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD or SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM.

best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: doubts with a Sup...
entry.content: Thank you for your answers, Sebastian. As for my implementation, I'll give feedback in a few days.

entry.title: PowerDesigner "edit selection" button unresponsive in report editor
entry.content:
Hi all,

While working on an MMR report in #SAP PowerDesigner 16.7.7.0 (7536), the "edit selection" button for any previously-edited report elements with selections became unresponsive. I can add a section which will open the selection window as usual, but when I try to edit an existing report element the selection window does not open. Did I trigger some lockout setting by accident? Or could my file be corrupted? My previous solution (I encountered this once before) was to re-create the report, but I would prefer to keep the old one, as creating a new one takes a considerable amount of time.

I am relatively new to PowerDesigner, so any help is greatly appreciated 🙂

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Issue while downloading the Classification from the S/4 Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to send an order from cloud system to DM. 

We werent able to download the classification. The order was download properly from the cloud system. But giving a authtoken error for classification. 

I have attached the response payload for the referance. 

Could anyone please help me out with this issue. 

Thank you in advance. 

KR,
Sayuj

entry.title: Re: Erro FIEBPP-112 intergração de retorno bacario FF.5
entry.content: Hi, Edrilan_Berisha, thank you for your comment. I believe that my access is not adequate to view the note, it gives me an error message when accessing this link But being able to visualize it with the help of another consultant. Anyway. I was able to verify that the SAP note 1548072 in question aims to correct another error, which does not occur in my system. When I check the invoices that are showing an error when running FF.5 I can see that there is no data in the BSEGC table and for this reason it shows the error message, FIEBPP-112.

entry.title: Re: T Code - K088 Error : No Valid Business Transaction category: KOAO
entry.content:
Dear Kamlesh,

while trying to implement the note for the S4CORE107, unfortunately system says that it can not be implemented. But i have the similar problem, while executing EOD IHB job: /PF1/R_IHB_GL_TRANSFER, i have the following error: No valid Business Transaction Category: IBIP. I can see from the note, that IBIP corresponds to the central incoming payment scenario, which is correct in our case. How can we fix this error? As i mentioned, system says that this note can not be implemented. Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
I see that dmak has also raised an enhancement about the surveys in an earlier comment. But from our side I would like to express some concerns as well, as optional surveys are currently a key feature in our learning landscape.

With the H2 2024 our end users will have the old and the new page side by side. If they are on the latest version, they will have no way of seeing that their are surveys available to them, in their dashboard.

This will lead to a loss in data that we need, to make sure we can continue to improve our learning offerings for our end user.

Are optional surveys planned to be added in the upcoming release or is this not part of any road map yet?

Not just as a point to the surveys but in general, I don't understand why SAP is removing the option to hide a new version of their product when the new version is not on par with what we currently have in place. This leaves us as a customer in a strange position in trying to prepare our business to adopt something that is not ready yet and will be a deprecation to their current way of working.

You can only make a first impression once.

Why not allow the customer to pick a moment when all existing features are available and we are confident that that impression will be good?

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud Output Management - Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hello Mattheus,

 

Thankyou for the detailed information,

May i know why was this empty  in output messages for printout scenario in the purchase order.

however, in print preview we can see all the data. 

kindly suggest me on this

entry.title: How to Insert a table varible from Storaged Procedure
entry.content:
Hello SAP Comunity

These days I have encountered a challenging problem while migrating a highly complex procedure from an MS SQL server to SAP HANA sintaxis. Let me explain

I have created a table variable 

 

DECLARE TEMP_SALES TABLE(
		"COD DOC"				    NVARCHAR(5)
		,	"DESCRIP DOC"			NVARCHAR(100)
		,	"TIP. ID"			NVARCHAR(5)
		,	"ID"		NVARCHAR(15)
		,	"NAME"			NVARCHAR(300)
.....)

 

 Furthermore, I'm trying to insert values into this table from the result of a storage Procedure. 

 

SYP_SP_SRI_ATS_REPORT_SALES(:DATE_INI, :DATE_END)

 

 I have tried many approaches like  "INSERT INTO Temp_sales from SP", " select .... from Call SP_sales" or "Temp_sales = select(SP_Sales) from Dummy " etc.

None of them have worked. It seems like working with procedures, nested temp_tables is not the correct approach for the migration of this report. 

Please Id extremely glad if someone can provide a solution. Any help would be utterly helpful

PSDTA: I have attempted to simplify the problem since the full report is more than 1000 lines of SQL. 

Do not hesitate if you need further reference regarding this. Thanks

Richard

We have migrated ECC with CFIN on Hana to S/4Hana 2023 with the selective data migration. But customer wants to Archive the ECC system for Audit/future references. 

Kindly let me what would be better option to keep old systems as ECC running in cloud.

 

Regards 

Mohan

entry.title: Re: How to find average lead time and average daily consu...
entry.content:
Hi there, 

in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition we offer this here: Demand-Driven Replenishment | SAP Help Portal

Might be too powerful of what you are trying to do? Maybe you try with one material. 

Br, Markus

entry.title: SAP Business ByDesign – What’s New 24.08
entry.content:
SAP Business ByDesign 24.08 is now ready!

SAP Business ByDesign 24.08  is now available and the SAP Business ByDesign What’s New blog gives you an overview about the most important new features of SAP Business ByDesign 24.08. These are the so called Focus Topics ().
For these Focus Topics, additional in-depth blogs and videos might be available - just click the link next to the Focus Topic in the What’s New blog.

To get an overview about all new features of SAP Business ByDesign in 24.08 please go to the What's New document.

Cross Topics

    • New What’s New Viewer
      With the new What'sNew format users now can quickly look up what's new in Business ByDesign using the new format incl. table view with filtering options.
    • Additional tiles to Home work center
      Users can now see the additional support related tiles under the Services and Support section for easier access to key information like product roadmap or legal changes update
    • Drag and Drop enablement for attachments
      User can easily drag and drop files to the “Drop Files to Attachments” area to attach the files so that user has better user experience.
    • Warning message in HTML Mashup for 3rd Party Cookies
      The user is now aware of the browser dependency of using HTML Mashups with respect to third-party cookies. The related  KBA is linked in the message.
    • Print Queue default Queue Retention Period
      The default Queue Retention Period for the print document queue has been reduced from 90 days to 7 days.
For detailed information about What’s New in the Cross Topics area, please click here.

Customer Relationship 
Management


 

 

    • PSM enablement of Customer Quote System Administrative Data
      Partners can now create PDI solution for Customer Quote based on reading the CreationIdentityUUID and LastChangeIdentityUUID of the Quote.
For detailed information about What’s New in the Customer Relations. Management area, please click here.

Supplier Relationship 
Management

 


 

 

    • Payment method in Supplier Invoice
      Customers can now choose to select a payment method in the supplier Invoice. The chosen payment method will be flown to accounting end.
    • Extension Scenario for Supplier Invoice Scanning Review Page
      As a key user, you can now select the newly created Supplier Invoice Scanning to Supplier Invoice extension scenario on the Scanning Invoice Review page. 
For detailed information about What’s New in the Supplier Relations. Management area, please click here.

Financial Management


 

 

    • Extension Scenario for Supplier Invoice Scanning Review Page
      It is now possible to read/write and an OData service on Business Object Sales Order and Customer Invoice Request can be created including these fields. 
    • Mass Manual Upload for Depreciation and Revaluation Postings for Fixed Asset
      It is now possible to upload mass manual postings using an XML template for the following scenarios: Depreciation /Revaluation / Acquisition /Partial Transfer of IMAT /Complete Transfer of IMAT. 
    • Lease contract report with multiple cost center assignment
      Lease contract report is now displaying all the cost centers in the organizational assignment tab.
    • PSM - Write access for FA BO- Attachment folder
      The Attachment folder is now write-enabled for the Public Solution Model (PSM).
    • PSM Read Release of Public Outport
      It is now possible that any custom development report can be read with this BO.
For detailed information about What’s New in the Financial Management area, please click here.

Localization



 


    • Norway
      Peppol Relevant Bank Account Number
      The customer can now select the Peppol Relevant check box to validate the active bank account to be included in the customer invoice.
    • Israel
      Form 6111 Tax Advisory Legal Change for 2023
      TNew codes 183, 184 are now available as input fields and the values are populated in the generated file.
      PDI BAdI for Exclusion of Withholding Tax Items
      It is now possible to identify the Split Invoice Documents relevant for Tax Reporting and to develop the logic for deleting these unwanted documents.
    • Spain
      SEPA Credit Transfer updated to v9 
      As per the legal change of Spain new rule book, effective from August 2024, the ISO Credit Transfer payment file can be generated using XSL transformation framework. 
      SEPA Direct Debit Transfer updated to v9 
      As per the legal change of Spain new rule book, effective from August 202o4, the ISO Direct Debit Transfer payment file can be generated using XSL transformation framework.
For detailed information about all country/region-specific features, please click here.

Solution Extensions


 

    • CEREALOG – PAAS For FACTOR
      With PAAS For Factor, it is easily possible to manage the exchange of information between a SAP Business ByDesign instance and the factoring organization to which you assign customer receivables to improve the cash flow.
    • Snap Int – Intrastat for non-localized countries
      This solution extends the Intrastat capability to encompass non-localized countries. Currently, the solution supports file generation for Bulgaria, Czech Republic, Croatia, Hungary, Romania, Slovenia, and Slovakia (Topic Video).
    • Seidor – Document downloader add-on 
      This solution enables you to go through any invoice and download the documents related to it (Topic Video).
    • WeCloudIT – E-Invoicing Italy
      with WeCloudIT fully-integrated solution you get rid of manual typing and clicking when issuing or receiving electronic invoices to/from your customers and suppliers.
    • MyWave.AI – Agentic AI co-pilot
      The solution streamlines the process of manually entering data by allowing miners to enter this information on a hardened tablet. Once connected online, the data is automatically pushed to SAP Busines ByDesign, improving accuracy, reducing manual work and delays, and enhancing overall efficiency.

The Partner innovation roadmap information is regularly update in this blog.

entry.title: Re: SAP Omnichannel Sales Transfer and Audit a new sales transaction validation industry cloud solut
entry.content: Thank you very much for your quick response, your comments and additional information.

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Q3 2024
entry.content:
Hi, I have a problem with the old Upload functionality made through a custom widget. The widget is gone and I get the following error:

Something went wrong. The system couldn't load the custom widget 'com.sap.fileUploadWidget_2.x' (kind: 'main') for this reason: The system took too long to define the custom widget. Please contact your system administrator or the owner of the custom widget.  Correlation ID: 30052112-2917-4205-a680-813878061993.

Anyone know if the existing upload functionality is not supported anymore and/or replaced by the new functionality and must be set up again?

Kind Regards,

Peter

entry.title: Re: COLUMN NAMES STRIPPING AFTER 30 CHARs when replicatin...
entry.content:
Thanks for the response @Michael39 

Unfortunately The view idea on the source to truncate the field names to 30 chars is not working.

Our target is SAP LT Replication Server SDK. As per SAP Note 2652704 - Replicating Data Using SAP LT Replication Server SDK, the views are not supported. 

Any other ideas?

entry.title: Re: Issues with an INT64 parameter in a Com UFL..
entry.content: Thank you for that feedback. Integer is not my solution as the values of this database column are much larger than ints. The String idea is a good one though however how to realize? I want to manipulate this value inside a formula. The ToText built in is no good it must internally convert the value to a double. What I'd really like is a way to not select column Table.LongVal, but instead select TOSTRING('table.longval') where TOSTRING is a SQL function my database knows about and have access to that in my formula. I just can't seem to find a way to do that.

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content: Fantastic! This is a long-awaited feature. Most important, it creates a log of changes for audit reviews. Thanks for the detailed blog.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA S4CORE107 error: No valid Business Transaction Category: IBIP
entry.content: While executing EOD IHB job (G/L transfer) in tcode sa38: /PF1/R_IHB_GL_TRANSFER, i have the following error: No valid Business Transaction Category: IBIP. I can see from the note 3269873 - Message FINS_ACDOC_CUST602 ("No valid Business Transaction Category: &1.") when creating a cost accounting transaction - SAP for Me, that IBIP corresponds to the central incoming payment scenario, which is correct in our case. How can we fix this error?  System says that this note can not be implemented. Thanks a lot

entry.title: how to set up PMR automatically when Production order is released?
entry.content:
how to set up PMR automatically when Production order is released?

As of right now, I'm manually generating PMR. The expectation is as soon as the Production order is released, the system should automatically create PMR request to EWM. 

Where can I make this settings?

entry.title: Re: How to create Code List based on CDS View with Business Context "WBS Element" block?
entry.content:
Dear Ramana,
I just had the same issue.
I didn't find my custom CDS view in the F4 help for the Value Help View in the Custom Fields app. 
After adding a C1 contract in the Properties->API State it showed up. 
Kind regards
Michael

entry.title: Re: First day of the month in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, in my case I had to aggregate data in model on daily level to monthly level. Worked with the following:

DATA([d/Date] = PERIOD([d/Date].[p/CALMONTH])) = RESULTLOOKUP()

Regards,

Thomas

entry.title: Re: What is SAP Approuter and its importance ?
entry.content: Thank you so much @Willem_Pardaens for the feedback, yes standalone Approuter can also be deployed on Kyma.

entry.title: DELAY NO RECEBIMENTO DE MENSAGENS PARA APROVAÇÃO DE DOCUMENTOS
entry.content:

Meu usuário SAP está com uma demora para exibir as mensagens para aprovação de documento. No entanto, ao realizar o log out e o log on posteriormente, é exibido as mensagens normalmente. Alguém poderia me ajudar a solucionar esta questão?

Atenciosamente,
João Paulo.

entry.title: Re: SAPI to ODP extractor conversion
entry.content: Hi Savio, thanks for your reply. Copy TRFN to new ODP ds is fine... more important questions is not losing delta when switching from SAPI to ODP

entry.title: Deploy Typescript-SAPUI5 Application to BTP
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am trying to deploy a SAPUI5 (Fiori) Application to the Business Technology Platform. The Application was built with Typescript, will be deployed via the managed approuter and does not contain a CAP-Service.

For a SAPUI5 Application that uses Javascript, I used a combination of the following commands:

from the package.json

mbt build --mtar <projectname>.mtar  && cf deploy mta_archives/<projectname>.mtar --abort-on-error --retries 0

from the mta.yaml

[...]

commands:
    - npm install
    - npm run build:cf

[...]

This resulted in a build version of the app beeing created in the /dist-folder, containing a zipped file  <applicationname>.zip, that is created via the custom Task: ui5-task-zipper defined in the ui5.yaml. As part of the deployment process, this file is copied to the /resources-folder and from there deployed to the BTP.

Now with Typescript:

I am using the same command in the package.json. But with the following ones in the mta.yaml:

[...]

commands:
    - npm install
    - ui5 build --all --clean-dest

[...]

This results in a correctly built typescript application in the /dist-folder, but is missing the .zip-version, because the ui5-task-zipper is not executed from the ui5.yaml. (So obviously no file can be copied to the resources-folder)

If I now add the configuration from the ui5.yaml by adapting the script:

[...]

commands:
    - npm install
    - ui5 build --all --clean-dest --config ui5.yaml

[...]

The ui5-task-zipper creates a "normal" SAPUI5-application in the /dist-folder, missing the conversion from typescript to javascript, but with a .zip-file. If this version is deployed, the application will can not be started, because it contains a Component.ts instead of a Component.js.

Can someone tell me how the correct deployment process looks like?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Lukas

entry.title: EDocument Cockpit "Mapping Requested" Application Error
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I'm currently trying to implement the FI-Invoice in the eDocument Cockpit. 

Current State is the XML Generation/Preview with AIF. 

Im getting the following error :

Any idea how to fix this error? 

 

Br,
Pablo

entry.title: How to Follow Candidates in New Applicant WorkBench?
entry.content: We are not seeing the following the option to use Action Menu in Candidate List or to use Take action on Candidate Page in the new Applicant Workbench.  See attachment from Legacy. How does this work with the New Applicant Workbench - we are not seeing in guides, nor we can't find when testing.  Has anyone else experienced this?

entry.title: Re: EWM-Ware House Process Type
entry.content: Hi, Do you mean that the new Ware House Process should I uncheck the indicator "Select HU Without Storage Process",

entry.title: Where can I learn the configuration and administration of SAP Fieldglass Rates 2.0?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Getting Started with SAP Fieldglass Rates 2.0 learning journey.


Overview
This learning journey will guide you through the configuration and administration of SAP Fieldglass Rates 2.0.

Learning objectives
Upon completing this course, administrators will be able to:

  • Examine the structure of a rate in the Rates 2.0 configuration
  • Learn the role of lookups when using Rates 2.0
  • Discover how Rates 2.0 provides greater flexibility and efficiency over Rates 1.0
  • Configure the Rates 2.0 structure, including creating a custom lookup
  • See how a Rates 2.0 configuration can co-exist with an existing Rates 1.0 configuration

Prerequisites

  • Introducing SAP Fieldglass

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge
We have also related SAP Fieldglass live sessions or this topic - register now 


Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: EWM-Ware House Process Type
entry.content: Hi, Do you mean that the new Ware House Process should I uncheck the indicator "Select HU Without Storage Process",

entry.title: SAP Build Workzone Standard Edition - Content Package Role
entry.content:
Hi,

Referring to this guide "A Guide to Developing and Deploying Content Packag... - SAP Community" by @jens_kristen : 

 I have issues with the roles in the Content Package and couldn't manage to get that solved.

When creating the Content Package, an error appears "Error: No src config for sample-role", but it continues with building the package. Also I get an error in Workzone. Could you please advise what could be the issue here? Many thanks! Max 

My role.json looks like this:

Content.json

entry.title: SIEM operations in action - Organization of SAP ETD operations and benefits on the security level
entry.content: In addition to regulatory requirements and the implementation of international security standards, the increasing number of cyber-attacks requires organizations to effectively operate Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) tools in their Security Operations Centers (SOCs) to respond to critical events in their IT landscape as quickly and efficiently as possible. In this session, we will discuss how to run SAP Enterprise Threat Detection (ETD) on a day-to-day basis in collaboration with a managed security service provider, how to implement regulatory requirements, and how to set up an effective response to critical system activities. We will also discuss the step-by-step integration of new system components (e.g. Cloud Connectors, SAP Success Factors) into ETD and how to ensure the efficiency and effectiveness of the SOC team through employee training (table top exercises). Finally, we will show you how the daily operation of our ETD security solution can increase the security level of the entire organization through its ability to identify multiple vulnerabilities.

entry.title: How to get the HTML code of a website with SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content: Hallo zusammen, ich versuche einen Prozess zu erstellen, um die Preise einiger Produkte zu prüfen. Dazu muss ich einige Links auf einer aufgezeichneten Website öffnen und den HTML-Code daraus abrufen. Ich finde in SAP BPA keine Aktivität, um den Code abzurufen. Hat jemand eine Idee, wie ich dieses Problem lösen kann?

entry.title: Re: Failed to load component for container - ModuleError:...
entry.content:
"Thanks for asking! I'm trying to load a component in my SAPUI5 application, but I'm running into an error. I've posted my manifest.json and PersonalDetails.js code above, but I forgot to include the XML code. Let me add that in.

pnl.view.xml

<mvc:View xmlns:form="sap.ui.layout.form" controllerName="employeeapplication.controller.pnl"
	xmlns:personal="employeeapplication.SharedBlocks.PersonalDetails"
	> 
<ObjectPageSection id="_IDGenObjectPageSection235" titleUppercase="false" title="Finance Project Details">
            <subSections>
                <ObjectPageSubSection id="financeDetailsId8" titleUppercase="false"  >
                    <blocks>
                     <personal:PersonalDetails id="_IDGenPersonalDetails1"/>
                    </blocks>
                </ObjectPageSubSection>
            </subSections>
        </ObjectPageSection>

 

sharedBlocks/personalDetails/PersonalDetails.view.xml

<mvc:View xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc" xmlns:forms="sap.ui.layout.form" xmlns="sap.m">
<form:SimpleForm id="_IDGenSimpleForm131" 
						editable="false"
					layout="ResponsiveGridLayout"
					labelSpanL="1"
					labelSpanM="2"
					emptySpanL="0"
					emptySpanM="0"
					columnsL="0"
					columnsM="0">
					<form:content>
						<m:Label id="_IDGenLabe132" text="Employee Id" />
						<m:Input id="_IDGenText1213" value="{Empid}"  enabled="false" />
						<m:Label id="_IDGenLabel231" text="Currency" />
						<m:Input  id="_IDGenText11223" value="{Curr}" enabled="false" />
						<m:Label id="_IDGenLabe1243" text="CTC" />
						<m:Input id="_IDGenText11233" value="{Ctc}" enabled="false" />
						<m:Label id="_IDGenLabel2231" text="Gross Salary " />
						<m:Input id="_IDGenText112231" value="{GrossSal}" enabled="false" />
						<m:Label id="_IDGenLabel2831" text="Days " />
						<m:Input id="_IDGenText112241" value="{Day_S}" enabled="false" />
						<m:Label id="_IDGenLabel2241" text="Joining Date" />
						<m:Input id="_IDGenText112251" value="{JoiningData}" enabled="false" />
					</form:content>
						</form:SimpleForm>

</mvc:View>

I'm trying to figure out what's causing the issue and how to fix it.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict the IP which can connect to SAP S/4 H...
entry.content: For an SAP HANA Cloud database, there is an allowlist that can be configured. For additional details see https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud-database/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database-security-guide/network-security

entry.content: does not work out of the box

entry.title: Re: Plants Abroad - Import
entry.content: Hi, did anyone find a solution to this problem?

entry.title: ABAPConf South Africa 2024
entry.content:
Join us for the ultimate gathering of ABAP enthusiasts in South Africa! Whether you're a beginner or an experienced developer, this conference is the perfect opportunity to expand your knowledge, network with like-minded professionals, and stay up-to-date with the latest trends in ABAP development. Get ready for a day filled with insightful sessions. Don't miss out on this fantastic event - mark your calendars now!

Find more information and register here!

*Please note that this event entry is a summarized version of the original event and your registration may be required by the organizer shared on the original event website. RSVP accuracy here is without guarantee and does not constitute registration. However, if you want to earn an SAP Community badge, please leave your RSVP here as well.

entry.title: Re: Activity Type ISO Code
entry.content:
Hi @burhanuzer,

I have an update related to your question. From 2408 Release changing units of measurement was opened for configuration. This is configuration activity "Check Units of Measurement".
Select dimension "Time" from the drop-down next to button "Units of Measurement". Click button "Units of Measurement". Then double-click unit of measurement STD (STD has commercial format HR) and remove the primary flag in section ALE/EDI. Then navigate to unit of measurement H and set the primary flag. Make sure that an ISO Code (recommended: HUR) is maintained for H.

It is recommended to decide for using H or HR and not to use both in parallel to avoid confusion.

Kind regards
Franziska

entry.title: Re: Finance issue
entry.content: Added Finance tag.

entry.title: Re: Custom field added by extending Manage Service Entry Sheet are not getting updated
entry.content: Did you get success in adding field? Can you provide brief how to?

entry.title: Re: Creation of a flexible Headcount Time Series with Stories in People Analytics
entry.content:
Hello Frank,

yes that solved the issue, never saw or used this field before. Thanks!

This will really help our HR Department in generating job and comp info reports on a monthly basis for personnel cost planning.

 

Kind regards

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Integrate LinkedIn Learning courses with SuccessFactors Learning (LMS)- Part 2
entry.content:
No i havent had anyone come back to me on how to manage the LiL content most efficiently 

so the steps seem to be:

OCN content Import whats not already imported (weekly manual task)

Add to LinkedIn LMS library (in LMS)

Im not sure how you disable courses once they are unpublished in LiL - i.e. LiL no longer host them but you have the course imported and linked to a library. this will cause issues 

the synching and maintenance of the LMS to LiL content is clunky and wont deliver a good user experience so we are still discussing options here!

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Thanks for designing the exciting exercises. Here is my outcome for 2nd week

entry.title: CDS Annotation Semantics.dateTime causes time zone change
entry.content:
Hey Experts,

I have a view extension where I create a timestamp:

 

extend view I_LogisticsOrder with ZX_MyViewExtA
{
  // Full timestamp for display
  concat( afko.getri, afko.geuzi ) as ZConfOrdFinDateTime
}

 

Now I want to show this timestamp as a proper date the list. It works but the time shown is in UTC and not in the correct time zone. If I remove the @Semantics.dateTime: true it shows the correct time stamp. There are ways to convert the time to a time zone but I dont want to add unnecessary complexity.

 

extend view C_ObjPgMaintOrder with ZX_MAINTORDEXT
...
{
...
    @ui: {
      lineItem: [{ position: 1346, importance: #HIGH }]
    }
    @EndUserText.label: 'Confirmed Order Finish Date/Time'
    @Semantics.dateTime: true
    _MaintenanceOrder._Order.ZConfOrdFinDateTime as ZConfOrdFinDateTime
}

 

Any ideas how to deal with this?

entry.title: Re: Failed to load component for container - ModuleError:...
entry.content: Why it is not in the webapp folder?

entry.title: Re: SAP BW 7.5 to SAP Datasphere: Why It’s Time to Skip SAP BW/4HANA and Embedded Analytics
entry.content: OK. Correction. Embedded analytics in S/4, if implemented directly without separated reporting system, then it makes sense (time to implement, benefit to the users, ...). Implementing it as a in-between solution prior to DSP, is what I agree that it makes no sense. Same as moving first to BW/4 just to use the BW/4 Model Transfer option.

entry.title: Re: PR/PO Flexible Workflow with role Assignment
entry.content:
Hi,

You don't need to activate HR module however you have an option to activate HR mini-Master data, but I would recommend create a Z table where you can maintain User ID, Positions and DOA limit. You need to work with developer and that Position can be determined by BADI (Agent Determined by BADI) based on Dollar value. 

If you are determining the workflow based on Cost centers, then you need to add Cost centers in the Z table as well.

 

Thanks,

Sanan Afridi

entry.title: Re: Massachusetts - Supplemental vs Base Wages
entry.content:
Hi Euna -

We are still OP - not SaaS.

Our issue is that for MA, the supplemental wages are being added to base wages and causing the taxes to be overstated. We are being told to remove the cumulation 14 (base wages for BSI) from our supplemental wage type.  The issue we have with this is that impacts all tax authorities and not just MA and we have been under the impression that all taxable wage types should have this cumulation marked.

entry.title: Re: SAP provided official document type list
entry.content:
Hi,

You can get the list of document types from SPRO>MM>Purchasing>Document Types.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Monetary rewards approval workflow
entry.content:
Hi team - Curious to know if there’s a way to turn off approval workflow for monetary rewards at a certain level (e.g., nominators or approvers at a certain level). Or is there a way to reroute approval workflow to proxy when a proxy is specified?

Thanks!
Kevin

entry.title: Unable to Create Well (T code : O3U_WL1) - SAP S/4 HANA PRA(Production & Revenue Accounting) Module
entry.content:
I have enabled the Business Function for PRA system. And trying to create Well but need help in number range configuration. 

Error 1. And Important table is missing for creating well. 

Error 2:  I have done the configuration looking into the attached config document.

https://help.sap.com/doc/63892a011ca4430a8a97acdb072c4701/2023/en-US/PRA_ConfigurationGuide_v1_4.pdf

Can any one help to fix, I have done the configuration based on the above document link. But for few table there are no proper documents.

Thanks,
Harshal

entry.title: Re: Mass update of the Planned price field in Material Master

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Complete.

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
@HarshAgarwal To my understanding there is no additional cost when spinning up EMIS. The charging should be fully consumption based.

Details in the note: https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2942344 

Best,

Karsten

entry.title: Adding smartfilterbars and button on Table Toolbar to standard Fiori app using Adaptation Project
entry.content:
In this blog we will learn SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects to extend a standard SAP Fiori application by generating and making simple changes to an application,  how to add custom fields in smartfilterbar section and button on Table Header toolbar. 

 Pre-requisites:

When we are creating adaptation project, you must have access of below: 

1. Business Application studio.

2. On-Premise system.

3. The app type must be Fiori elements. If you want to know the Fiori app type - go to the Fiori app reference library. 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Create the Fiori Adaptation Project 

We will create adaptation project for Manage Sales Order - F1873. 

  • Go to Business Application Studio and Create project template as Adaptation Project and Start.

 

 

 

 

  • Select the Target environment: ABAP

 

 

 

 

                                                                          

  • Project the basic information like Project Name, Application Title, Namespace.                                           

  • Provide the configuration details of OnPremise system and click on Finish button.                           

   

 

 

 

 

  •  Project folder and all dependencies are installed in BAS tool.     

                                                                     

 

 

 

 

 

  • Add custom OData service in Adaptation Project -> Right click on the Project -> Adaptation Project.

  • Now we can see in the project directory that a folder named Changes has been added with file for OData Model.             

          

  • Run the Fiori app - To run the adaptation project --> Right click on Project --> Adaptation Project --> Open preview.   

                                                                                     

  • Now the standard fiori app can be edited and changed according to the client requirement. To make new changes, follow the steps as given in the screenshot below.

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                                                                   

  • Open the Fiori app in Edit mode.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                

 

 

 

 

 

  • Scenario: As per the requirements:  - Add Button on Table level – Add a Button - Select All (When the user clicks on the button, all the table rows should be selected).
  • To Create a button, we will select the table header and toolbar -> Right click à Create a fragment and corresponding controller.                                     

 

 

 

 

 

 

  • Click on Add fragment --> create a fragment -  selectRow.fragment.xml file under fragments folder. Add a button in the fragment.                                                       

 

                            

 

 

 

  • create a onOpenDialogpress function in extension controller file - changes.js, to select all rows from table with validation. 

 

 

 

 

 

 

  • When no row is selected then messagebox popup will open.                                                            

                                                       

 

 

 

  • Add custom smartfilterbars for F4 valuehelp and Dropdown for Plant and overall status fields using fragment.                                                                                                                                                      

 

 

 

 

 

 

  • Add XML code for Dropdown and F4valuehelp in smartfbar.fragment.xml.

 

 

 

 

 

  • To open valuehelp on Plant field smartfilterbar, Write the logic ( function: onPlantVH) in extension controller changes.js     

                                                                             

 

 

 

 

 

  • Create a PlantVH.fragment.xml to open the valuehelp on Plant Filterbar, as done in previous step.      

 

 

 

 

  • Smartfilterbars will get added for Plant and pausedOrder Field.        

    

 

 

  • Add Logic in extension controller changes.js to get the data in table based on custom and standard filters.

         If you want to know more about controller extension file or adaptation Fiori app. Please read from the                SAP SDK docs.

Override extension functions

  • onInitSmartFilterBar
  • provideExtensionAppStateData
  • restoreExtensionAppStateData
  • ensureFieldsForSelect
  • addFilters

 

 

 

/***
@controller Name:sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport.view.ListReport,
*@viewId:cus.sd.salesorders.manage::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport.view.ListReport::C_SalesOrderWl_F1873
*/
/*!
 * OpenUI5
 * (c) Copyright 2009-2023 SAP SE or an SAP affiliate company.
 * Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 - see LICENSE.txt.
 */

sap.ui.define([
	'sap/ui/core/mvc/ControllerExtension',
	'sap/m/MessageBox',
	'sap/ui/model/Filter',
	'sap/ui/model/FilterOperator',
	'sap/m/Token'
	],
	function (
		ControllerExtension,
		MessageBox,
		Filter,
		FilterOperator,
		Token
		// ,OverrideExecution
	) {
		"use strict";
		return ControllerExtension.extend("customer.app.variant2.Changes", {
			// metadata: {
			// 	// extension can declare the public methods
			// 	// in general methods that start with "_" are private
			// 	methods: {
			// 		publicMethod: {
			// 			public: true /*default*/ ,
			// 			final: false /*default*/ ,
			// 			overrideExecution: OverrideExecution.Instead /*default*/
			// 		},
			// 		finalPublicMethod: {
			// 			final: true
			// 		},
			// 		onMyHook: {
			// 			public: true /*default*/ ,
			// 			final: false /*default*/ ,
			// 			overrideExecution: OverrideExecution.After
			// 		},
			// 		couldBePrivate: {
			// 			public: false
			// 		}
			// 	}
			// },

			// // adding a private method, only accessible from this controller extension
			// _privateMethod: function() {},
			// // adding a public method, might be called from or overridden by other controller extensions as well
			// publicMethod: function() {},
			// // adding final public method, might be called from, but not overridden by other controller extensions as well
			// finalPublicMethod: function() {},
			// // adding a hook method, might be called by or overridden from other controller extensions
			// // override these method does not replace the implementation, but executes after the original method
			// onMyHook: function() {},
			// // method public per default, but made private via metadata
			// couldBePrivate: function() {},
			// // this section allows to extend lifecycle hooks or override public methods of the base controller
			// override: {
			// 	/**
			// 	 * Called when a controller is instantiated and its View controls (if available) are already created.
			// 	 * Can be used to modify the View before it is displayed, to bind event handlers and do other one-time initialization.
			// 	 * @memberOf customer.app.variant2.Changes
			// 	 */
			// 	onInit: function() {
			// 	},

			// 	/**
			// 	 * Similar to onAfterRendering, but this hook is invoked before the controller's View is re-rendered
			// 	 * (NOT before the first rendering! onInit() is used for that one!).
			// 	 * @memberOf customer.app.variant2.Changes
			// 	 */
			// 	onBeforeRendering: function() {
			// 	},

			// 	/**
			// 	 * Called when the View has been rendered (so its HTML is part of the document). Post-rendering manipulations of the HTML could be done here.
			// 	 * This hook is the same one that SAPUI5 controls get after being rendered.
			// 	 * @memberOf customer.app.variant2.Changes
			// 	 */
			// 	onAfterRendering: function() {
			// 	},

			// 	/**
			// 	 * Called when the Controller is destroyed. Use this one to free resources and finalize activities.
			// 	 * @memberOf customer.app.variant2.Changes
			// 	 */
			// 	onExit: function() {
			// 	},

			// 	// override public method of the base controller
			// 	basePublicMethod: function() {
			// 	}
			// }

			_getODataModel: function () {
                return this.getView().getModel("customer.sales");
            },

			onOpenDialogPress: function () {
				// Create a confirmation dialog
				if (this.getView().byId("cus.sd.salesorders.manage::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport.view.ListReport::C_SalesOrderWl_F1873--responsiveTable").getItems().length === 0 || this.getView().byId("cus.sd.salesorders.manage::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport.view.ListReport::C_SalesOrderWl_F1873--responsiveTable").getItems().length === undefined) {
					sap.m.MessageBox.error("Please click on Go button to fetch the table data.");
					return;
				}
				var oDialog = new sap.m.Dialog({
				  title: "Confirmation",
				  type: "Message",
				  content: new sap.m.Text({
					text: "Please click on Go button to fetch the table data."
				  }),
				  beginButton: new sap.m.Button({
					text: "Ok",
					press: function () {
						
						var oTable = this.getView().byId("cus.sd.salesorders.manage::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport.view.ListReport::C_SalesOrderWl_F1873--responsiveTable");
						var aItems = oTable.getItems();
						aItems.forEach(function(oItem) {
							oItem.setSelected(true);		
				});
				oDialog.close();
					}.bind(this)
				  }),
				  endButton: new sap.m.Button({
					text: "Cancel",
					press: function () {
					  // Handle 'No' button press
					  oDialog.close();
					}
				  }),
				  afterClose: function () {
					oDialog.destroy();
				  }
				});
		  
				// Open the dialog
				oDialog.open();
			  },

			  onPlantVH: function () {
				this._getDialog().open();
			},
			_getDialog: function (oEvent) {
				if (!this.pDialog) {
					this.pDialog = sap.ui.xmlfragment(
						"customer.app.variant2.changes.fragments.PlantVH", this
					);
					this.getView().addDependent(this.pDialog);
				}
				return this.pDialog;
			},
			onPlantSearch:function (oEvent) {
				var sValue = oEvent.getParameter("value");
				var oFilter = new Filter("VALUE", FilterOperator.Contains, sValue);
				var oBinding = oEvent.getSource().getBinding("items");
				oBinding.filter([oFilter]);
			},
			onPlantVHClose: function(oEvent) {
				var aSelectedItems = oEvent.getParameter("selectedItems"),
					oMultiInput = this.byId("idPlantComboBox");
				if (aSelectedItems && aSelectedItems.length > 0) {
					aSelectedItems.forEach(function (oItem) {
						oMultiInput.addToken(new Token({
							text: oItem.getCells()[0].getText()
						}));
					});
				}
			},
			override:{
				onBeforeRendering: function () {
					
					let oFilter = this.getView().byId("cus.sd.salesorders.manage::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport.view.ListReport::C_SalesOrderWl_F1873--listReportFilter");
					oFilter.attachInitialise(function (oEvent) {
						let aFiltersItems = oEvent.getSource().getAllFilterItems();
						aFiltersItems.forEach((item) => {
							// not showing the custom added filter in filterbar for Plant
							if (item.getName() === "Plant" || item.getName() === "Paused_order") {
								item.setVisibleInFilterBar(false);
							}	
						});
					}.bind(this));
				},

				
				
				templateBaseExtension:{
					addFilters: function (fnAddFilter) {

						// custom filter for Plant
						var oPlant = this.byId("idPlantComboBox"),
							aSelectedTokens = oPlant.getTokens();

						if (aSelectedTokens.length > 0) {
							var aFilter, aFilters = [];

							aSelectedTokens.forEach((token) => {
								aFilter = new sap.ui.model.Filter({
									path: "Plant",
									operator: sap.ui.model.FilterOperator.EQ,
									value1: token
								});

								if (oPlant.getTokens().length > 1) {
									aFilters.push(aFilter);
								}
							});

							let aFinalFilter;
							if (aFilters.length > 0) {
								aFinalFilter = new sap.ui.model.Filter({
									filters: aFilters
								});
							} else {
								aFinalFilter = aFilter;
							}

							if (aFinalFilter) {
								fnAddFilter(this, aFinalFilter);
							}
						}

						// Custom Filter for Paused Order
						var oPausedOrder = this.byId("idPaused_orderComboBox"),
							aSelectedTokens = oPausedOrder.getSelectedKeys();

						if (aSelectedTokens.length > 0) {
							var aFilter, aFilters = [];

							aSelectedTokens.forEach((token) => {
								aFilter = new sap.ui.model.Filter({
									path: "Paused_order",
									operator: sap.ui.model.FilterOperator.EQ,
									value1: token
								});

								if (oPausedOrder.getSelectedKeys().length > 1) {
									aFilters.push(aFilter);
								}
							});

							let aFinalFilter;
							if (aFilters.length > 0) {
								aFinalFilter = new sap.ui.model.Filter({
									filters: aFilters
								});
							} else {
								aFinalFilter = aFilter;
							}

							if (aFinalFilter) {
								fnAddFilter(this, aFinalFilter);
							}
						}
					},

					
					provideExtensionAppStateData: function (fnSetAppStateData) {
						var oPlant = this.byId("idPlantComboBox"),
						aSelectedTokens = oPlant.getTokens();
						fnSetAppStateData(this, {
							customApprovalFilter: aSelectedTokens
						});

						var oPausedOrder = this.byId("idPaused_orderComboBox"),
						aSelectedPausedOrder = oPausedOrder.getSelectedKeys();
						fnSetAppStateData(this, {
							customApprovalFilter: aSelectedPausedOrder
						});
					},
					restoreExtensionAppStateData: function (fnGetAppStateData) {
						var oExtensionData = fnGetAppStateData(this);
						if (oExtensionData) {
							this.byId("idPlantComboBox").setTokens(oExtensionData.customApprovalFilter);
							this.byId("idPaused_orderComboBox").setSelectedKeys(oExtensionData.customApprovalFilter);
						}
				}
				
			}
		}
		});
	});

 

 

 

 

  • Deployment of Adaptation Project

        Right click on Project/webapp folder --> select Adaptation Project --> Open Deployment Wizard.                

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

  • Select the system, where you want to deploy.

 

 

 

  • Provide the package information: 

 

 

 

 

  • Provide the Workbench TR and deploy the adaptation project. 

Note: If new changes come from your client side, after making changes in the application, delete the existing project from the gateway system to redeploy and follow the below step.

Go to SE38 --> run the report (/UI5/DEL_ADAPTATION_PROJECT) --> execute --> Provide the app variant ID --> execute --> to delete the records provide the Transport No. --> select all entries from the table --> Press delete button. After completing the process we can redeploy the Fiori app same as given in deployment step.

 

 

Congratulation now you are running Adaptation project, try custom and standard Filterbar, and fetch the data based on the filters.

 

Keep learning & Keep Sharing!! 🙂

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Create Your Rules (5/5)
entry.content:
Hi @Gaayathri & @ranjeetkumar07  ,

This is really helpful on understanding the Rules and responsibility Management.

We have a requirement to copy a standard Flexible workflow along with the responsibility rules to a custom one.  Could you please explain on how can we copy the assigned responsibility rules & team functions from standard flexible workflow to a custom one. While copying , the assigned responsibility rules are not copying by default.

 

Thanks,

Gowtham.

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Completed.

entry.title: Re: 物料出库科目替代
entry.content: tks

entry.title: Re: SAP provided official document type list
entry.content: You are right, we can get the list from here. But in case of some clients, they need exclusive documents to fill their repository, and in case of govt clients sometimes the ask is too weird and difficult. We have worked on the ask by providing the list, prior to posting this question as well, in the same way as you have told plus there are also couple of other ways. But the client insist on a document provided by SAP that mentions the document type. But still thanks a lot for the reply. If you can find a document from official SAP, please do let me know. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: How Do I Copy Master Data Fields to a Sales Document?
entry.content:
@CE6 Thanks for the information, I will try to achieve it. 

One more question, I created the custom field for customer core view business context, but the field is not visible even after publishing it. I'm I missing to enable some service for this? I used business context Customer Core View, should we use Master Data: Business Partner (BP_CUSTVEND1) ?@CE6

entry.title: Re: CDS Annotation Semantics.dateTime causes time zone change
entry.content: where you show the datatime? in ui?

entry.title: SAP ByDesign webservice : Query Employee Actual times
entry.content:
Hello, 

Is it really the case that this webservice is not supported at all when the status is "not released". ? I should be able to use the webservice to retrieve employee timesheets for specific time periods and then delete those timesheets. There are several thousand rows involved, so manual deletion is not an option. As far as I understand, there is no possibility for mass deletions in the UI either, so webservice is the only option here.

I tried this webservice via SOAP, but the errors just seemed to indicate that this webservice is not supported. Other possible supported web services can also be pointed out. 

Any tips on how to deal with this? 

 

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Where can we find class SegmentID, any guide ?
entry.content:
Where can we find class SegmentID, any guide ?

We are looking to complete API class completion record 

 

{
"segmentAttendances" : [
{
"scheduleID": 3750,
"userID": "User-1",
"segmentID": 1,
"comments": "User Attended Segment"
},
{
"scheduleID": 3750,
"userID": "User-2",
"segmentID": 1,
"comments": "User Attended Segment"
}
]
}

entry.title: Re: SAP provided official document type list
entry.content: You can show them the screenshot from the Doc types and you can explain little bit each document. Not sure where you will find that unless you raised with SAP an incident and they can share a link with you.

entry.title: Re: SAP BW 7.5 to SAP Datasphere: Why It’s Time to Skip S...
entry.content: in s4, if you are doing any report and the all the data you need is in s4, embedded analytics is your go-to solution.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Week2 completed.

entry.title: Re: Issues with an INT64 parameter in a Com UFL..
entry.content:
Sounds like you simply need to create an SQL Expression. 
No need for a UFL for such a simple case.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud: Field Extension Wizard in S/4HANA Cloud 2408
entry.content:
Nice blog post.

This feature is also available in SAP BTP ABAP Environment, though there  are no extensible RAP BO's available so far.  

However you can run in the trial systems a hands-on script that explains in depth the topic of developer extensibility.

abap-platform-rap630/README.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-platform-rap630 (github.com)

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: What's New in SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition 2408?
entry.content:
As you may know by now, SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition is a software-as-a-service (Saas) solution on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) that is used to govern core attributes of business partner data (more domains planned). This public cloud solution is perfectly suited for organizations seeking at kick-starting a master data management initiative at low entry barriers (see also the overview presentation). 

Full Functional Scope

For details of the complete functional scope, see the latest deep-dive presentation about SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition.

What's New?

Continuing the path of innovations outlined in my blog post on the 2405 release, the 2408 version comes with the following enhancements:

Enhancements to the core attributes of the business partner data model

You can now assign one or multiple organizational units such as purchasing organization, sales area, or company code to a business partner. This feature comprises the assignment of organizational units only. It does not include further organizational attributes like reconciliation accounts, incoterms, or payment methods, etc. Features include:

  • Option to create an organizational unit, e.g. purchasing organization, sales area, or company code, directly when creating a business partner using the quick create view or the object page​
  • Assignment of multiple organizational units
  • At least one supplier or customer role is required to create a supplier or customer organizational unit.​
  • All MDG processes support the organizational unit assignment.​
  • Possibility to authorize users to create and/or display organizational units
  • Possibility to upload the business configuration from the backend system to SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition via spreadsheet
  • Possibility to define validation rules for organizational units

Fig.: Assignment of organizational units to supplier record

You can exchange organizational units (purchasing organizations and company codes) for suppliers between SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition and other applications using SOAP.

Inbound process integration of business-partner relationships

You can exchange business partner relationships between SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition and other applications using SOAP. For this purpose, the new SAP_BX_DCM and SAP_BX_DMU process templates are available. Please note that you can only exchange business partner relationships with systems that support time-dependent business partner relationships. 

Key Benefits

These innovations increase the scope of action for data stewards:

  • through added business content in data models.
  • added support for decentralized maintenance now including relationships.

To stay on track, simply follow the SAP Community Topic Page for SAP Master Data Governance, read the MDG-related blogs, and join the  Q&A forum.

Best,

Markus

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Well (T code : O3U_WL1) - SAP S/4 HANA PRA(Production & Revenue Accounting)
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you.
